content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

In how many years will a sum of $800 at 10% per annum compound semi-annually become $926?

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

Given that, P = $800, R = 10% per year, A = $926, T = ?

By formula, Amount,
A = P (1 + ((R/2)/100))2T
⇒ 926.1 = 800(1 + (5/100))2T
⇒ (926.1 /800) = (21 /20)2T
⇒ (9261 /8000) = (21/20)2T
⇒ (21/20)3 = (21/10)2T

On comparing, we get
2T = 3
⇒ T = 3/2 years

Therefore, in 3/2 years the semi-annually compounded sum will become $926.1
